title: Asia tech stocks sink as oil spike and Qatar attacks threaten chip supply chain
summary_full: Asian technology stocks fell on Thursday as Iran's latest attacks on Qatar's Ras Laffan Industrial City and a surge in oil prices rattled investor sentiment.
summary_public: Asian technology stocks fell on Thursday as Iran's latest attacks on Qatar's Ras Laffan Industrial City and a surge in oil prices rattled investor sentiment.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran's latest attacks on Qatar's Ras Laffan
